description: Resource type definition for AWS::SageMaker::Experiment. An experiment is a collection of related trials used to organize and track machine learning workflows.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the experiment.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the experiment.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z\-]*:sagemaker:[a-z0-9\-]*:[0-9]{12}:experiment/  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ExperimentName.description: The name of the experiment. Must be unique in your AWS account and is not case-sensitive.
ExperimentName.markdownDescription:
The name of the experiment. Must be unique in your AWS account and is not case-sensitive.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 120  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,119}$  
Update requires: Replacement

DisplayName.description: The name of the experiment as displayed. The name does not need to be unique.
DisplayName.markdownDescription:
The name of the experiment as displayed. The name does not need to be unique.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 120  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,119}$  
Update requires: No interruption

Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the experiment.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 3072  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.description: A list of tags to associate with the experiment.

Key.markdownDescription:
The tag key.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^([\p{L}\p{Z}\p{N}_.:/=+\-@]*)$  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
The tag value.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^([\p{L}\p{Z}\p{N}_.:/=+\-@]*)$  
Update requires: No interruption
